subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! Thou seest me clinging unto Thee, turning toward Thy horizon, soaring in the atmosphere of Thy love, and holding fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی ترانی متمسکا بک و مقبلا الی افقک و طائرا فی هواء حبک و متشبثا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
